prose.en: Retain {param:cm-02.03_odp} of previous versions of baseline configurations of the system to support rollback.

guidance.en: Retaining previous versions of baseline configurations to support rollback include hardware, software, firmware, configuration files, configuration records, and associated documentation.

prose.en: {param:cm-02.03_odp} of previous baseline configuration version(s) of the system is/are retained to support rollback.

objects.en: procedures addressing the baseline configuration of the system
system configuration settings and associated documentation
copies of previous baseline configuration versions
Organizational personnel with configuration management responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Organizational processes for managing baseline configurations

guidelines.en: the number of previous baseline configuration versions to be retained is defined;
